title: saxifraga nivalis var. genuina
intro: Saxifraga nivalis var. genuina, also known as the white saxifrage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the saxifrage family and is native to the European Alps. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. Saxifraga nivalis var. genuina can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
